title: The Last Trail
writer: Zane Grey, Jules Furthman, Paul Schofield
actors: Maurice 'Lefty' Flynn, Eva Novak, Wallace Beery
plot: The successful operations of a lone bandit known as "The Night Hawk" terrorize a frontier town, and when a stranger arrives riding a fine horse, suspicions are aroused and he is mistaken for the criminal. Winifred, who is engaged ...
